title: vaccinium repens
intro: Vaccinium repens, also known as creeping bilberry, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to Europe. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium repens include its ability to help manage diabetes, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Vaccinium repens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and its berries are also consumed fresh or dried for their nutritional value.
